heading: Pinkett vs Pinnacle Swamp — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pinkett, New South Wales and Pinnacle Swamp, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pinkett and Pinnacle Swamp have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Pinkett or Pinnacle Swamp safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pinkett has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Pinnacle Swamp scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pinkett scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Pinnacle Swamp scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pinkett or Pinnacle Swamp?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pinkett has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
